sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77189" key="panaguria/rxas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παν-αγυριάρχας</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παν-αγύριος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παν-άγυρις</orth>, <sense id="n77189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πανηγ-</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
